phase_3_2_execution_queue.title: Decouple Bootstrap & Config — Execution Phase
phase_3_2_execution_queue.order: DC-001 first (provides PlatformPaths), then DC-002 + DC-003 in parallel

items.title: Wire PlatformPaths through 14+ remaining direct app.* call sites
items.context: DC-001 exploration found PlatformPaths interface already exists with ElectronPlatformPaths and BrowserPlatformPaths implementations. But 14+ call sites still call app.getPath()/app.isPackaged()/app.setPath() directly. The extraction work is wiring the interface through, not inventing a new abstraction.
items.action: Inject PlatformPaths instance into index.ts main function. Replace all app.getPath()/app.isPackaged()/app.setPath() calls with PlatformPaths equivalents. Move UPDATER_ENABLED behind a config accessor. Make store.ts accept cwd as constructor param.

items.title: Wire installBrowserApi() and verify Chrome renders the app
items.context: DC-002 exploration found the renderer has ZERO direct Electron imports. browser-api.ts (343 lines, 291 test lines) exists with full polyfill coverage but is NEVER wired into entry.tsx. The only action needed is calling installBrowserApi() before render() in entry.tsx.
items.action: Wire installBrowserApi() at the top of entry.tsx before render() call. Verify the app loads at localhost:3000 with no console errors. All Platform-dependent features should work (server connection, session, notifications).
items.depends_note: Low dependency — installBrowserApi() only provides window.api polyfill for direct access patterns. Can proceed before DC-001 completes.

items.title: Close 3 plugin transport blocking gaps
items.context: DC-003 exploration found the plugin transport system is 75% built but has 3 blocking gaps that keep ElectronPluginTransport from activating. Main-side handlers (plugin-transport-ipc.ts) are complete and functional. Not a single line of plugin transport code needs to be added to make it work — just 3 small changes.

gaps.title: Add PluginTransport type to @opencode-ai/plugin/desktop
gaps.action: Export PluginTransport interface: { send(channel, data?)→void, invoke(channel, data?)→Promise<unknown>, on(channel, handler)→()=>void, off(channel, handler)→void, destroy()→void }
gaps.detail: Renderer plugin-transport.ts:15 imports `type { PluginTransport } from '@opencode-ai/plugin/desktop'` but desktop.ts doesn't export it. Import is dead.

gaps.title: Wire plugin transport methods in preload bridge
gaps.action: Add pluginSend, pluginOn, pluginOff, pluginInvoke to ElectronAPI type and preload bridge implementation. These are already declared in ipc-contract.ts ComplexAPIMethods but never implemented.
gaps.detail: The renderer's createPluginTransport() checks api?.pluginSend, always gets undefined, falls back to NoopTransport.

gaps.title: Add transport field to DesktopPluginApi
gaps.action: Add `transport?: PluginTransport` to DesktopPluginApi interface. In plugin-loader.ts, call createPluginTransport() and inject the result into api.transport before calling mod.desktop(api).
gaps.detail: Even if transport worked, DesktopPluginApi has no transport field for plugins to receive it.

already_working: Main process IPC handlers in plugin-transport-ipc.ts (message routing, handler registration, push broadcast) — fully functional
Channel name constants in ipc-channels.ts (PLUGIN_INVOKE, PLUGIN_SEND, PLUGIN_PUSH)
Renderer createPluginTransport() factory + ElectronPluginTransport implementation + NoopTransport fallback — correct code, just never activated
Plugin config IPC channels (getDesktopPluginConfig/setDesktopPluginConfig) — fully functional
DesktopPluginLoader correctly loads plugins and wires slots/store/lifecycle
items.depends_note: Can proceed immediately — gaps are in preload+SDK, not in PlatformPaths

phase_3_3_cleanup.title: Audit Product-Shape Hardcoding — Dead Code Removal

items.title: Remove 583 lines of verified dead code
items.context: HC-004 exploration inventoried 583 lines of dead code across 9 findings. 3 files are safe to remove immediately (no cascading imports): platform-config.ts (142 lines, zero imports), plugin-transport.ts (empty stub), meta.ts (188 lines, zero production imports). 2 files require cascading edits: renderer/plugin-transport.ts and its companion plugin-transport-ipc.ts + ipc.ts L30 call site.

phase_2_cascading: packages/desktop/src/renderer/plugin-transport.ts (remove — 122 lines, never imported, depends on dead type)

phase_3_1_remaining.title: Postgres Migration — Fully Complete
phase_3_1_remaining.note: The Postgres Migration chain (PG-001→PG-002→PG-003→PG-004) is fully complete. All 48 Pg tests pass. CI pipeline with Postgres 16 service is configured. Migration runner applies on startup. No remaining work in Phase 3-1.

phase_3_4_and_3_5.title: Dialog Tests + Localization — Fully Complete
phase_3_4_and_3_5.note: DT chain (DT-001→DT-002) fully done: 59 dialog tests, 9 files, 0 failures. L10N chain (L10N-001→L10N-002→L10N-003) fully done: 62 i18n tests, fallback chain active, stub generation script ready. No remaining work.

blocking_dependency_chains.description: After this session, the only remaining chain is DC-001 → DC-002 + DC-003. Everything else is complete.
blocking_dependency_chains.remaining_chain: DC-001-execution (wire PlatformPaths) → DC-002-execution (wire browser-api) + DC-003-execution (close plugin transport gaps)
notes: DC-003 execution (plugin transport gaps) does NOT strictly depend on DC-001 — gaps are in preload and SDK, separate from PlatformPaths. Can proceed in parallel.
DC-002 execution (wire installBrowserApi) also does NOT strictly depend on DC-001 — the browser api polyfill is independent of PlatformPaths config.
HC-004 execution (dead code removal) is independent of everything — safe to run anytime.
After these 4 items complete, Phase 3 is 100% done.

recommended_next_lanes.title: Close 3 plugin transport gaps
recommended_next_lanes.context: 3 small changes: add PluginTransport type to SDK (1 file), wire preload bridge methods (2 files), add transport field to DesktopPluginApi (2 files). ~100 lines total. Typecheck passes.

recommended_next_lanes.title: Wire installBrowserApi() in entry.tsx
recommended_next_lanes.context: One-line change: call installBrowserApi() before render() in entry.tsx. Polyfill exists with 291 lines of tests. Ready to activate.

recommended_next_lanes.context: 14+ call sites across 6 files need conversion from direct app.getPath()/app.isPackaged()/app.setPath() to PlatformPaths interface. Already have both Electron and Browser implementations. Pure wiring work.

recommended_next_lanes.title: Remove 583 lines of verified dead code
recommended_next_lanes.context: Phase 1: 4 files safe to delete immediately. Phase 2: 3 files with cascading remove+call site update. See hc-004-dead-code-inventory.v1.json for full inventory.

risk_notes: The async PKCE token storage fix from github-ipc.ts has not been verified against CI — run the github-ipc-token-crypto test after any change to safeStorage or OAuth flow.

Pre-existing type errors (107) in src/agent/operating-picture.ts (12) and src/lifecycle/ (48 across builtins.ts, loop.ts, definition.ts, engine.ts) may cause false typecheck failures for new lanes — ignore if unchanged.
DC-003 and DC-002 both touch preload/index.ts and preload/types.ts — coordinate if running in parallel. Use produce_fragment or do one then the other.
The roadmap source of truth appears to use a separate store from roadmap_progress — this session's 15 completions may not be reflected if the toolset sources from a different file.

platform-config.ts will need to be preserved or its content migrated BEFORE deletion in HC-004 — it's listed as dead code but may be needed by DC-001-execution. Coordinate: DC-001 must extract the PlatformPaths content before HC-004 removes the file.
